goal: Compare Adam vs SGD optimizer for a 3-layer MLP on MNIST classification. Use 2000 training samples, 5 epochs, 5 seeds (42, 123, 456, 789, 1024). Report accuracy with paired t-test and Cohen's d.
direction: Compare Adam vs SGD optimizer for a 3-layer MLP on MNIST classification. Use 2000 training samples, 5 epochs, 5 seeds (42, 123, 456, 789, 1024). Report accuracy with paired t-test and Cohen's d.
